zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume de Sauqueville於1042年出生在法國時，他的父親Herbrand de Sackville22歲，母親Godchilde de Ponthieu23歲。他和Albreda de Tregoz至少有3個女兒。他去世於1113年在英國巴金哈姆爾法利享年71歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume de Sauqueville was born in 1042, in France, his father, Herbrand de Sackville, was 22 and his mother, Godchilde de Ponthieu, was 23. He had at least 3 daughters with Albreda de Tregoz. He died in 1113, in Fawley, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume de Sauqueville est né en 1042, à France, son père, Herbrand de Sackville, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Godchilde de Ponthieu, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 filles avec Albreda de Tregoz. Il est décédé en 1113, à Fawley, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume de Sauqueville 1042 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Herbrand de Sackville 22 und seine Mutter Godchilde de Ponthieu 23. Er hatte mit Albreda de Tregoz mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb 1113 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Fawley, Buckinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Sauqueville è nato il nel 1042 nel Francia, il suo padre, Herbrand de Sackville, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Godchilde de Ponthieu, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figlie con Albreda de Tregoz. Morì nel 1113, nel Fawley, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Sauquevilleが1042年にフランスで生まれた時，父Herbrand de Sackvilleは22歳，母Godchilde de Ponthieuは23歳であった。彼はAlbreda de Tregozとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1113年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアファウリーで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Sauqueville(이)가 1042년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Herbrand de Sackville(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Godchilde de Ponthieu(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Albreda de Tregoz(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1113년 영국 벅잉함실르 파w리에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Sauqueville nasceu em 1042, em França, seu pai, Herbrand de Sackville, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Godchilde de Ponthieu, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhas com Albreda de Tregoz. Ele faleceu em 1113, em Fawley, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume de Sauqueville родился в 1042 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени Herbrand de Sackville было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Godchilde de Ponthieu, 23. У него было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Albreda de Tregoz. Он умер в 1113 г. в местности фавли, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume de Sauqueville nació en 1042, en Francia, su papá, Herbrand de Sackville, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Godchilde de Ponthieu, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijas con Albreda de Tregoz. Murió en 1113, en Fawley, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años.
